_README: EXAMPLE per-work-folder config overlay. Copy this to  <WorkDir>/verify_config.json  and edit.
It is deep-merged over VerifyConfig.psd1 at startup. Precedence: CLI args > this JSON > .psd1 > session fallback.
Only include the keys you want to override - every other setting falls back to VerifyConfig.psd1.
Tip: run  VerifyTool.ps1 -Phase InitConfig  inside your WorkDir. First run generates a FULL file;
when the file already exists it REPAIRS instead: your settings are kept as-is and ONLY fields the
tool gained since the file's _SCHEMA stamp are appended (a sparse file stays sparse; leave _SCHEMA
alone -- it is ignored at runtime). Use the f=Force option to regenerate the full snapshot.
Run  VerifyTool.ps1 -Phase InitConfig -Interactive  then pick w to walk a group field-by-field
(Enter=keep, value=set, -d=delete, q=stop; no path typing needed), or v/e/d by JSON path; s to save.
J4EvidenceDir and Address below are the SINGLE canonical fields (they replaced the duplicated
DeliverFiles.J4EvidenceDir / Mail.EvidenceFolder / Reviewer.Address, which still win if an old file sets them).
InitConfig also writes verify_config.README.txt with field explanations; JSON itself cannot use // comments.
Save as UTF-8 (no BOM). Japanese text is fine as plain UTF-8.

Mark._TemplateExample: Add "Template": "gift_hm_status.png" (+ optional Tolerance/PadX/PadY) to a Boxes entry to try image-recognition placement first, falling back to OffsetX/OffsetY/Width/Height above when no match is found. See mark_templates/README.txt.
